BetFury Online Crypto Casino and Sports Betting Platform

Looking for an outstanding bitcoin casino experience? Look no further than BetFury – a top-tier crypto casino with a range of exclusive In-house games, vast selection of online slot machines, live casino games and unbeatable partnerships. With three years of experience in the field, we've built a platform that offers something for everyone, whether you're looking to earn crypto or simply relax and enjoy bitcoin gambling.

The platform uses blockchain technology to provide transparency and fairness in the gaming process. Also, BetFury offers a variety of games, including Slots, Table games, and Live Casino games. In addition, here you can find Bitcoin Sportsbook where users can place bets on various sports events.

One of the unique features of BetFury are its utility BFG token, Staking pool and mining opportunities. So let’s dive into the world of exciting gaming, sports betting, great features, a friendly community, unique BFG token mining, and daily multicurrency payments. 

Fairness at Online Casino Gambling

At BetFury crypto casino, we guarantee that every result is 100% random. Don't just take our word for it – you can easily check for yourself on our Fairness page! Our provably fair principle is based on the same SHA256 technology as Bitcoin, ensuring complete transparency and fairness in all of our crypto gambling games.

To verify the fairness of each bet, simply click on the "Fairness" button and copy the next round hash. Then, place your bet and check for a match of hashes. This straightforward process allows you to be absolutely sure about the transparency and fairness of our platform.

At BetFury, we pride ourselves on providing a reliable and trustworthy btc gambling experience for all of our users. So, come and enjoy the best bitcoin casino games with complete peace of mind, knowing that every result is random and fair.

Advantages of Crypto Gambling at BetFury

So, what sets BetFury apart from other online casinos? The answer is simple - our focus on crypto. We understand the importance of digital assets in today's world, and that's why we have created a platform that is exclusively tailored to meet your crypto betting needs. From our secure and transparent payment system to our extensive game portfolio, everything is designed to ensure that you have a seamless and rewarding betting experience.

Here are main advantages of gambling and betting with crypto:

  • Privacy
    With Bitcoin's pseudonymity, casual gamblers can have fun without worrying about being judged by the people around them.
  • Security 
    Bitcoin is one of the most secure digital currencies out there - if you store it correctly. You can rest assured that your money is safe if you keep your private keys private.
  • Instant Payments 
    Bitcoin payments are incredibly fast, and most transactions get confirmed within minutes. This means you can fund your account or withdraw winnings instantly.
  • Cost-Effective 
    Bitcoin transaction fees are a fraction of the fees associated with bank transfers or credit card payments. This benefits both the gambler and the website owners.
  • Optimized for Online Gaming
    Bitcoin was made especially for online use, making it a near-perfect solution for online gambling platforms. It eliminates the need for cumbersome institutions like credit card companies, banks, and payment processors, guaranteeing a high level of privacy, security, efficiency, and ease-of-use.

Best Bitcoin Casino Games to Play Online

BetFury is a one-stop crypto casino with over 5000 casino games from more than 70 leading gaming providers. We understand the importance of game creators in the iGaming industry. Whether you are looking for Slot machines, Table games, or Live casino games, you are sure to find something to suit your tastes and preferences on our platform. With over a hundred software providers on our platform, you can choose any game you like. 

Some of our popular providers include:

  • Pragmatic Play
  • Evolution
  • Spinomenal
  • Playson
  • Microgaming
  • Platipus 
  • PlaynGo
  • NetEnt
  • Red Tiger

In-House Games Designed for Maximum Profit and Fun

At BetFury crypto casino, we pride ourselves on developing unique In-house games that are designed with our Betfurians in mind. Our games like Plinko, Dice, Crash, Hilo, Keno, Mines, CoinFlip offer maximum amenities and specific charm. The minimum bet size for In-house games is 0.00000001 in any currency, which means you can bet less than $1 and still hit a huge multiplier to grow your assets to hundreds or thousands of dollars!

Our bitcoin casino platform is designed to offer our Betfurians an immersive gaming experience with exclusive features that make gameplay more enjoyable and rewarding. Here are some of our unique features that you can enjoy:

  • AutoMode – Take the Lead with Your Gaming Strategy
  • Live Chart – Track Your Profits with Ease
  • Hotkey – Simplify Your Gaming Process
  • FastMode – Save Time for More Wins

Online Slot Machines with Excellent Functionality and Large Payouts

Our Slots category boasts over 8000+ exclusive games from classic slots to Megaways. With over 100+ well-known online crypto game studios partnered with us, you can expect nothing less than diversity and excitement. Spin the reels of our bright and juicy slots to feel the online casino atmosphere and earn real money.

Modern video slots come with different features that add to the excitement of the game. These features can be categorized into bonus symbols, reel bonuses, and mega bonuses. Symbols like Wild, Explosive, and Staked symbols, Scatter, etc. appear on the reels and give different buffs. Reel bonuses like Cluster Pays or Megaways enhance the gameplay, while mega bonuses offer Free Spins, Bonus Games, Bonus Buy, and Progressive jackpots.

We understand that players want to try out a game before playing for real money. That's why we offer a free demo mode where you can play free bitcoin casino games. Try different strategies, analyze the payout mechanism, and get used to the gameplay before playing for real money.

Live Dealer Game Shows at Live Casino

Step into the world of real-time gaming with our Live Casino Games! Immerse yourself in the electrifying atmosphere of a real casino, but from the comfort of your own home. You'll find everything from poker to roulette in our Table Games section. For additional excitement, BetFury also offers Scratchcards, Keno, Bingo, and other intriguing games in our Special games section. If you find a game you particularly enjoy, simply add it to your "Favorite" category for easy access and to save time when placing more bets!

BTC Casino Table Games

Discover the world of serious games for experienced players on BetFury! Whether you're aiming for the Royal Flush in poker, betting everything on red in roulette, or playing the legendary blackjack and baccarat, our Table Games category has got you covered. Not only will this brighten up your evening, but it will also allow you to earn significant crypto rewards in areas where you're already a professional.

Lucrative Opportunities of Utility BFG Token 

Mine BFG while Playing 

One of the ways to get BFG, the internal BetFury token, is mining by placing bets in any currency available on BetFury. The mining price of BFG can be tracked on the Staking page and depends on the BTC exchange rate at Binance and rises after every 50 000 000 BFG mined.  A user needs to make bids in Slots or In-house games, and BFG tokens will be automatically added to the game balance. The more bets you place – the bigger amount of BFG you mine.

Multicurrency Staking Payouts 

Once you own at least 10 BFG tokens, you can take advantage of the staking capabilities of multicurrency daily drops. 3% of the total BetFury profit is released on the Staking pool every 24 hours and distributed among all the BFG holders. Players who stake BFG and get daily rewards in 5 currencies: BTC, BNB, TRX, USDT, ETH. The more tokens you have – the greater Staking rewards you get. 

Trade BFG on DEX & CEX exchanges

BFG is a liquid asset and already listed on the top DEX and CEX exchanges like Biswap, ApeSwap, Arken Finance, Hotbit, CoinTiger, Mate, Matcha, and Coin98. It extends the set of usage opportunities and empowers the investment and trading capabilities of BFG. Now you can buy, sell and exchange BFG in other cryptos.

Take Part in BTC Casino Tournaments and iGaming Battles 

Battles are what true champions and wealthy BetFury players with overflowing cryptocurrency wallets desire. As quoted by Mr. Fury, "everyone wants BFG and entertainment!" Therefore, BetFury players frequently participate in thrilling Battles to share in sizable prize pools. There are daily Battles with a $10,000 prize pool, themed Battles that are exhilarating, and iGaming Battles with various gaming providers for even bigger winnings. Don't let the opportunity to beat everyone pass you by!

Moreover, we host a plethora of challenging entertainment and collaborative tournaments with our partners. Players can participate at any time and compete for substantial rewards paid out in various cryptocurrencies. Keep up to date with all of the BetFury entertainments on our News page. Prove to others that you have what it takes to become a part of the BetFury elite!

Enjoy Bitcoin Sportsbook at BetFury

Feel the spirit of the breathtaking activities with the BetFury Sports. 50 000+ Live events every month and 80+ Sports are accessible for winning bets. Enjoy bitcoin betting with the highest odds, exclusive promotions, referral bonuses, and Staking rewards. Bets are accepted in BFG or any other cryptocurrency available on the platform.  

Rich Crypto Casino Perks and Bonuses

At BetFury, we're dedicated to making your gaming experience as enjoyable as possible. That's why we're thrilled to offer the most generous and diverse range of Casino Bonuses around! Play your favorite games with even more excitement and earn additional rewards along the way.

Welcome Bonuses and Free Spins

BetFury extends a warm welcome to all newcomers by offering an enticing gift of 100 Free Spins without requiring any initial deposit. Play to your heart's content, relish your earnings and receive 100 Free Spins upon registration with no deposit necessary.

Our team  believes in offering bonuses that cater to everyone's tastes. Our Bonus Cabinet features three Bonus Packs complete with Deposit Bonuses and Free Spins. Browse through the packs, choose your desired one, make a wish, and activate it.

Bitcoin Casino Bonuses for Best iGaming Experience

We offer 12+ different bonuses to suit all types of players, from Cashback and Rakeback to FuryCharge and much more. You can choose the bonuses that best suit your needs, or go ahead and use them all at once!

With our Free-to-Play games, Free Boxes, and Fury Wheel, you'll have plenty of opportunities to earn crypto for free every single day. Plus, by completing Daily Tasks and catching Mr. Fury, you'll be able to raise your rank and unlock even more perks.

But that's not all – we also offer bonuses for being active in our chat, including Coindrops, Rains, and Tips. And, if you invite your friends to join BetFury, you can earn referral bonuses and enjoy Success Sharing.

At BetFury, we believe that everyone should be able to enjoy the excitement of online gaming, and the range of bonuses at our online BTC casino is just one way we strive to make that happen. So come on in, and let's play – and win – together!

Multicurrency variety and different Networks 

Expanding multicurrency borders, BetFury sees no limit. Currently, users can get a competitive advantage of using over 50 of the most popular crypto assets (BTC, ETN, BNB, USDT, TRX, DOGE, LTC, USDC, POLYGON, SOL, TON) available for deposits and withdrawals. Notably, the platform supports different networks such as ERC-20, Polygon, Binance Smart Chain, and TRC-20, making players' experiences as comfy as possible.

How to Create Account

Accessibility and convenience are the most accurate characteristics of registering an account on BetFury. Users are able to choose a preferable way to sign up and start the exciting journey just in a few clicks. Creating an account is available via email address, Telegram, or by connecting one of the wallets that the platform supports – Binance Wallet, MetaMask, Coin98, iToken Wallet, CCTip, ONTO, Coinhub, TrustWallet, Klever.

How to Make a Deposit in Crypto

BetFury platform continues to provide an instant automatic Deposit system:

  • Sign in and press “Deposit” in the header respectively;
  • Select the preferred currency for deposit and supported Network (ERC-20, Polygon, BSC, etc);
    BetFury supports over 50 currencies and 10 networks;
  • Copy the generated address to send funds.

It’s Important to check:

  • The correct network.
  • Selected cryptocurrency which is supported on BetFury.
  • A deposit amount is greater than the minimum specified for a selected currency.

How to Withdraw Funds

Independently of the kind of crypto you’ve deposited, you may withdraw it to any external wallet, which supports the network you choose. Select which network you want to use (ERC-20, BSC, BEP-20, Polygon etc.) for making a withdrawal.

The security of your funds is our top priority, so our risk department conducts a manual audit of each transaction. That's why withdrawals can take up to 24h for wins in In-house games and up to 72h for wins in integrated games. In particular cases, it may take a longer period to check it properly.
